S.FORM: == Daryl Anderson == kawas tay 1951, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 7, Daryl Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. Daryl Anderson htgan beh Seattle,Washington ,hiya telivi psibay na Amerika.Shirley (n√©e Gallagher) ťõ™ŤéČ hiya yaya ru Donald Anderson hiya yaba. taring myugi ru mqwas maki pqwasan biru. 19 kawas lga,tmwang ngasal na znagayan pkbalay ega na squliq maki Seattle. 1972 kawas,hiya t'aring semong myugi ru mqwas,wal magal ru masoq krahu' pqwasan biru maki Washington. 1976 kawas,te qutux mhtuw telivi maki"Sweet Revenge". 1977-1982 kawas,Anderson mhtuw telivi "Lou Grant"praw Dennis Price. 1984 kawas,Anderson ru Kathy Connell wal msqun la. 1995 kawas šĽ•šĺÜ,qutux kawas qutux kawas praw Amerika psibay hlahuy squliq kap kbalay ega . 1980-2002 kawas mthoki na SAG,Anderson ga pcyagun nya ga mhayzyu ru rmaw gmluw phngyang teribiy ka si'buzi zmangay.hiya te qutux śúČŤĀ≤biru maki 2006 kawas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == *arjl an*ers~…ēon == kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, *arjl an*ers~…ēon, s~…ēquliq na ő≤uŇče Ē. *arjl an*ers~…ēon ńßt…£an ő≤eńß s~…ēeattle,was~…ēńßiŇčton ,ńßija teli*i ps~…ēiő≤aj na amerika.s~…ēńßirlej (n*e …£alla…£ńßer) ** ńßija jaja ru *onal* an*ers~…ēon ńßija jaő≤a. tariŇč mju…£i ru mqwas~…ē maki pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. ** kawas~…ē l…£a,tmwaŇč Ňčas~…ēal na zna…£ajan pkő≤alaj e…£a na s~…ēquliq maki s~…ēeattle. **** kawas~…ē,ńßija t ĒariŇč s~…ēemoŇč mju…£i ru mqwas~…ē,wal ma…£al ru mas~…ēoq krańßu Ē pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru maki was~…ēńßiŇčton. **** kawas~…ē,te qutux mńßtuw teli*i maki"s~…ēweet re*eŇče". ****-**** kawas~…ē,an*ers~…ēon mńßtuw teli*i "lou …£rant"praw *ennis~…ē pri ¶~ ®e. **** kawas~…ē,an*ers~…ēon ru katńßj ¶~ ®onnell wal ms~…ēqun la. **** kawas~…ē **,qutux kawas~…ē qutux kawas~…ē praw amerika ps~…ēiő≤aj ńßlańßuj s~…ēquliq kap kő≤alaj e…£a . ****-**** kawas~…ē mtńßoki na s~…ēa…£,an*ers~…ēon …£a p ¶~ ®ja…£un nja …£a mńßajzju ru rmaw …£mluw pńßŇčjaŇč teriő≤ij ka s~…ēi Ēő≤uzi zmaŇčaj.ńßija te qutux **ő≤iru maki **** kawas~…ē. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē
S.FORM: == Daryl Anderson == kawas tay 1951, ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 7, Daryl Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. Daryl Anderson htgan beh Seattle,Washington ,hiya telivi psibay na Amerika.Shirley (n√©e Gallagher) ťõ™ŤéČ hiya yaya ru Donald Anderson hiya yaba. taring myugi ru mqwas maki pqwasan biru. 19 kawas lga,tmwang ngasal na znagayan pkbalay ega na squliq maki Seattle. 1972 kawas,hiya t'aring semong myugi ru mqwas,wal magal ru masoq krahu' pqwasan biru maki Washington. 1976 kawas,te qutux mhtuw telivi maki"Sweet Revenge". 1977-1982 kawas,Anderson mhtuw telivi "Lou Grant"praw Dennis Price. 1984 kawas,Anderson ru Kathy Connell wal msqun la. 1995 kawas šĽ•šĺÜ,qutux kawas qutux kawas praw Amerika psibay hlahuy squliq kap kbalay ega . 1980-2002 kawas mthoki na SAG,Anderson ga pcyagun nya ga mhayzyu ru rmaw gmluw phngyang teribiy ka si'buzi zmangay.hiya te qutux śúČŤĀ≤biru maki 2006 kawas. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
